item.title: 伊朗比特币前景不明，传统经济资产抢尽风头
item.description: 今年大部分时间里，比特币的价格一直徘徊在6万美元至7.5万美元之间，多次看似即将突破，却始终未能真正实现。【原文：Bitcoin has spent most of this year trapped between $60,000 and $75,000, repeatedly teasing a breakout but never quite delivering one.】

item.title: 受预算赤字上限担忧影响，印尼股市和债市双双下跌
item.description: 受市场担忧普拉博沃·苏比安托政府正逐步取消长期以来对国家预算赤字设定的上限影响，印尼股市和政府债券价格出现下跌。【原文：Indonesia’s stocks and government bonds fell on concern Prabowo Subianto’s administration is moving closer to removing the long-held deficit ceiling for the state budget.】

item.title: 尼日利亚寻求释放被牢牢持有的股票中的流动性
item.description: 尼日利亚监管机构正在重新审视上市公司流通股比例的要求，以提升市场流动性、深化股票市场并吸引投资者。【原文：Nigerian regulators are reviewing free-float requirements for listed companies to boost liquidity, deepen the equity market and attract investors.】

item.title: 伊朗局势推高油价，日本股市面临盈利风险
item.description: 随着伊朗局势升级推高原油价格，市场担忧能源成本上涨可能侵蚀企业利润，此前由强劲企业盈利支撑的日本股市涨势开始显露脆弱迹象。【原文：Japan’s equity rally built on strong corporate earnings is beginning to look vulnerable as the escalating conflict in Iran pushes crude oil prices higher, stoking concern that rising energy costs could erode profits.】

item.title: 阿里巴巴推出AI工具，助力企业把握中国代理商热潮
item.description: 阿里巴巴集团控股有限公司计划推出面向企业的自主人工智能服务，借势国内对OpenClaw等人工智能助手的热潮——这类助手能帮助用户完成实际任务。【原文：Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. plans to release an agentic AI service for companies, banking on national enthusiasm around artificial intelligence assistants like OpenClaw that help users perform actual tasks.】

item.title: 博弈论预示着局势将进一步升级
item.description:
尽管特朗普希望打一场短暂的战争，但轻松实现“TACO式撤军”的窗口已经关闭。【原文：

For all that Trump wants a brief war, the window for an easy TACO exit is closed.

】

item.title: 新西兰CPI预计将超出目标值，加息预期升温
item.description: 新西兰四家主要银行中有三家表示，由于伊朗战争推高了燃料成本，今年大部分时间新西兰通胀率可能突破储备银行1%-3%目标区间的上限，这促使交易员提前押注加息。【原文：New Zealand inflation is likely to breach the top of the Reserve Bank’s 1-3% target band for much of the year as the Iran war drives up fuel costs, three of the four major local lenders say, prompting traders to bring forward bets on interest-rate increases.】

item.title: 随着比索汇率逼近60的关键关口，菲律宾中央银行出手干预
item.description: 菲律宾比索汇率持续走弱，逼近每美元兑60比索的关键心理关口，促使央行出手干预以支撑本币汇率。【原文：The Philippine peso weakened toward the key psychological level of 60 pesos per dollar, prompting the central bank to intervene to support the currency.】

item.title: 随着战争导致石油供应受阻，日本开始动用战略石油储备
item.description: 随着中东战事威胁到能源进口国的能源安全，日本已开始动用国家石油储备。【原文：Japan started releasing oil from the nation’s reserves, as the war in the Middle East threatens the energy security of importers.】

item.title: 战争扰乱全球供应，中国动用化肥储备
item.description: 鉴于中东战争扰乱了全球贸易流动并推高了主要作物营养素的价格，中国决定在今年早些时候释放商业化肥储备，以应对春播季节的需求。【原文：China has decided to release commercial fertilizer stockpiles for the spring planting season early this year, as war in the Middle East disrupts global trade flows and pushes up prices of key crop nutrients.】

item.title: 石油冲击即将体现在印度企业的资产负债表上
item.description: 市场要稳定，就需要原油和天然气供应恢复平稳。【原文：A return to steady crude, gas supplies needed for markets to stabilize.】

item.title: 据称，百度投资的BioMap已秘密提交香港IPO申请
item.description: 据知情人士透露，北京智图智能科技有限公司已秘密提交了在香港首次公开募股的申请，预计今年将筹集数亿美元。【原文：BioMap Beijing Intelligent Technology Co. has filed confidentially for a Hong Kong initial public offering that could raise a few hundred million dollars this year, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 中国最大炼油商因战争影响供应而将产能削减10%
item.description: 随着中东战事不断升级以及霍尔木兹海峡航运受阻导致原油供应受限，中国最大的炼油企业中石化已下调了加工量。【原文：China’s biggest oil refiner Sinopec has trimmed run rates as the widening Middle East war and difficulties shipping through the Strait of Hormuz choke supplies of crude.】

item.title: 受油价影响，中国30年期国债收益率料将创2024年以来最高收盘水平
item.description: 受伊朗局势推高油价、进而加剧通胀担忧的影响，中国30年期国债收益率正朝着2024年9月以来的最高收盘水平迈进。【原文：Yields on China’s 30-year bonds were headed for the highest close since September 2024 as rising oil prices fueled by the war in Iran stoked inflation concern.】

item.title: 中国钢铁产量下滑，钢厂正调整以应对需求疲软
item.description: 今年前两个月，中国钢铁产量出现下滑，因为各钢厂为应对需求萎缩，继续收紧产量。【原文：Chinese steel output fell in the first two months of the year as mills continued to rein in production to counter shrinking demand.】

item.title: 尽管战争风险蔓延，中国经济仍出现意外反弹
item.description: 中国年初的主要经济指标表现好于预期，这表明在伊朗战争动摇全球增长和通胀前景之前，经济势头正在好转。【原文：China’s main economic indicators fared better than forecast to start the year, in a sign that momentum was improving before the war in Iran roiled the outlook for global growth and inflation.】

item.title: 迪拜主要机场因燃油罐遭袭暂停航班
item.description: 随着伊朗冲突进入第三周，一架无人机撞击了迪拜主要国际机场的设施，导致该机场暂时停飞，这使得该航空枢纽恢复运营的努力遭遇挫折。【原文：Dubai temporarily halted flights at its main international airport after a drone struck facilities, setting back the aviation hub’s efforts to restore operations as the Iran conflict enters its third week.】

item.title: 随着楼市低迷态势缓解，中国房价跌幅收窄
item.description: 2月份中国房价跌幅收窄，这表明房地产市场的低迷态势可能终于触底。【原文：China’s home price declines moderated in February, a sign that the property downturn may finally be reaching a bottom.】

item.title: 针对SK海力士和三星的杠杆押注或将撼动韩国市场
item.description: 韩国股市过度依赖两家芯片巨头的风险早已被指出，但在伊朗战争爆发后，这个近4万亿美元的股市因剧烈波动而动荡之前，鲜有人对此予以重视。【原文：The risks of South Korean stock market’s reliance on two chip heavyweights have long been flagged, but few took them seriously until the nearly $4 trillion market was rocked by volatility after the Iran war.】

item.title: 中东大型电解铝厂大幅减产，铝价上涨
item.description: 随着全球最大电解铝厂之一关闭近五分之一的产能，铝价随之上涨。中东战事导致该地区供应受阻，进一步加剧了供应短缺的风险。【原文：Aluminum advanced after one of the world’s biggest smelting facilities closed almost a fifth of capacity, deepening the risk of shortages as the war in the Middle East chokes supplies from the region.】

item.title: 受中美谈判可能推迟影响，大豆价格暴跌逾2%
item.description: 周一，芝加哥大豆期货暴跌逾2%——跌破每蒲式耳12美元——因美国与全球最大大豆买方中国之间的贸易谈判可能推迟。【原文：Chicago soybean futures slumped more than 2% on Monday — dropping below $12 a bushel — in the face of a potential delay of US trade talks with China, the world’s top buyer of the oilseed.】

item.title: 倔强的普拉博沃与印尼富豪及市场怀疑论者针锋相对
item.description:
该国总统表示，他遭到金融界关键人物的误解，但他们最终会转变态度。【原文：

The nation’s president says he’s misunderstood by key players in the financial world, and they’ll eventually come around.

】

item.title: 澳大利亚外长表示，该国在伊朗战争中的角色仍将保持防御性
item.description: 一位政府高级官员表示，澳大利亚在伊朗日益升级的战争中的参与将仅限于为波斯湾的合作伙伴提供防御支持，但并未承诺协助保护霍尔木兹海峡的航运安全，尽管美国正寻求盟友的协助。【原文：Australia’s involvement in the escalating war in Iran will be limited to providing defensive support for partners in the Persian Gulf, a senior government official said, stopping short of committing to help protect shipping in the Strait of Hormuz as the US seeks assistance from allies.】

item.title: 日本财务相片山表示，必要时将在外汇市场采取果断措施
item.description: 日本财务大臣表示，鉴于中东局势持续紧张，日元兑美元汇率正趋近关键关口，当局已做好准备，必要时将采取果断措施应对外汇市场的波动。【原文：Japan’s finance minister said authorities are prepared to respond to movements in the currency market with bold steps if necessary, as the yen weakens toward a key threshold against the dollar amid ongoing Middle East tensions.】

item.title: 特朗普表示，他希望先解决伊朗问题，然后再转向古巴
item.description: 唐纳德·特朗普总统表示，古巴希望与美国达成协议，但他希望先结束伊朗战争，然后再转向这个岛国。【原文：President Donald Trump said Cuba wants to make a deal with the US, but that he wants to finish the war in Iran before turning to the island nation.】

item.title: 西太平洋银行首席执行官米勒表示，能源价格飙升加剧了澳大利亚储备银行面临的挑战
item.description: 西太平洋银行集团首席执行官安东尼·米勒表示，近期油价的剧烈波动使澳大利亚储备银行在应对通胀压力时面临的局面更加复杂。【原文：Westpac Banking Corp. Chief Executive Officer Anthony Miller said the recent oil-price shock is adding to a complicated picture for the Reserve Bank of Australia as it navigates inflationary pressure.】

item.title: 京东进军欧洲，中国零售巨头与亚马逊正面交锋
item.description: 京东集团正进军英国及其他欧洲国家，这是其海外扩张战略的一部分。作为中国版亚马逊，京东在国内市场面临着激烈的竞争。【原文：JD.com Inc. is launching in the UK and other European countries, part of an overseas expansion as China’s answer to Amazon faces intense competition in its home market.】

item.title: 台湾利率互换市场因通胀及汇率风险转向押注加息
item.description: 随着油价飙升和货币贬值引发通胀担忧，固定收益投资者已将未来数月台湾可能加息的预期纳入了定价考量。【原文：Fixed-income investors are pricing in an interest-rate hike in Taiwan in the coming months as surging oil prices and a weakening currency spark inflation concerns.】

item.title: 《金融时报》称，特朗普暗示若未获霍尔木兹海峡援助将推迟与习近平的峰会
item.description: 据《金融时报》援引对美国总统的采访报道，唐纳德·特朗普表示，如果北京方面不协助疏通霍尔木兹海峡，他可能会推迟与国家主席习近平原定的峰会。【原文：Donald Trump said he could delay his planned summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping if Beijing doesn’t help unblock the Strait of Hormuz, the Financial Times reported, citing an interview with the US president.】

item.title: 路透社称，中国愿意增加购买美国农产品
item.description: 据路透社报道，在巴黎举行的双边贸易谈判首日，中方谈判代表表示愿意增购美国农产品——包括禽肉、牛肉和非大豆类大田作物。【原文：Chinese negotiators showed an openness to making additional purchases of US agricultural products — including poultry, beef and non-soybean row crops — during the first day of bilateral trade talks in Paris, Reuters reported.】
